auditMetadata.updateReason: Reconciliation complete: Fixed README command counts, removed vaporware, marked guardian-lite docs as deprecated
auditMetadata.analysisMethod: Cross-reference documentation claims against codebase implementation

inaccurate.claim: Three Protection Levels: Watched, Warning, and Protected
inaccurate.reality: Protection levels in code are actually: 'watch', 'warn', 'block' (not 'Watched', 'Warning', 'Protected')
inaccurate.fix: Standardize terminology. Use 'Watch', 'Warn', 'Block' consistently or clarify that display names differ from internal values

inaccurate.reality: The mapping uses different terms. Code shows 'watch', 'warn', 'block' as enum values, but UI shows '🟢 Watch', '🟡 Warn', '🔴 Block'
inaccurate.fix: Update documentation to use consistent terminology: Watch/Warn/Block throughout

inaccurate.claim: Access over 30 commands through VS Code's Command Palette
inaccurate.reality: package.json actually defines 51 commands in contributes.commands (42 implemented)
inaccurate.fix: FIXED 2025-12-17: Updated README to say 'over 50 commands'

inaccurate.claim: 5-20 files is typical for most projects; More than 100 files may impact performance
inaccurate.reality: Protection lookup is O(1) per the code. The performance claim may be outdated given file-based blob storage.
inaccurate.fix: Verify actual performance characteristics and update recommendations

inaccurate.reality: V2 Engine migration completed Dec 2025. Guardian is deprecated, replaced by packages/engine with signal scripts
inaccurate.fix: Replace all Guardian references with V2 Engine. Update: Guardian → Engine, Plugins → Signal Scripts

outdated.claim: Settings table shows limited list of settings
outdated.reality: package.json defines 40+ settings including Engine (formerly Guardian), AI Detection, MCP, Telemetry sections not fully documented
outdated.fix: Add documentation for all settings categories: Engine (7 settings), AI Detection (3 settings), MCP (6 settings), Auto Decision (6 settings), Telemetry (4 settings)

outdated.reality: Code accepts lowercase values: 'watch', 'warn', 'block'. The capitalized versions may work via normalization but aren't the primary format.
outdated.fix: Clarify that both lowercase ('watch', 'warn', 'block') and capitalized ('Watched', 'Warning', 'Protected') are accepted

outdated.reality: V2 Engine has 448 tests. This number is outdated.
outdated.fix: Update to reflect current test count or remove specific numbers that change frequently

outdated.reality: guardian-lite package was REMOVED in Week 6 of V2 migration (Dec 2025)
outdated.fix: PARTIAL 2025-12-17: Added deprecation notice to docs/architecture/implementation-quick-reference.md. pnpm-lock.yaml still has stale entry (run pnpm install to regenerate).

missing.description: 8 MCP tools are fully implemented but not documented in user-facing docs
missing.suggestedDoc: Create mcp-integration.md in apps/vscode/docs/user-guide/ or update advanced-features.md

missing.description: Session management (list, restore, export) is implemented but not documented in user guide
missing.suggestedDoc: Add Session Management section to advanced-features.md or create dedicated sessions.md

missing.description: The new V2 engine with signal scripts is not documented for users or contributors
missing.suggestedDoc: Create engine-architecture.md explaining: signals, validators, actions, transports, runtime

missing.description: 10 signal scripts provide risk analysis but are undocumented
signals: threats.ts - Security threat patterns (secrets, mocks, destructive)
missing.suggestedDoc: Create signals-reference.md documenting each signal's purpose and output

missing.description: 6 Auto Decision settings control automatic protection but are not in settings.md
missing.suggestedDoc: Add Auto Decision section to settings.md documenting: autoDecision.riskThreshold, autoDecision.notifyThreshold, autoDecision.minFilesForBurst, autoDecision.maxSnapshotsPerMinute, snapshot.aiDetectionEnabled, snapshot.autoRestoreOnDetection

missing.description: 5 CLI commands implemented via V2 CLIEngineAdapter but apps/cli/README.md is minimal
missing.suggestedDoc: Create comprehensive CLI documentation with examples for: analyze, snapshot, list, interactive, check commands

missing.description: 14+ API endpoints implemented with HTTPEngineAdapter and OpenAPI schema but no user-facing API docs
missing.suggestedDoc: Consider generating API reference documentation from OpenAPI schema at /api/docs

missing.description: Sign in/out and auth status commands are implemented but not in user guide
missing.suggestedDoc: Add Authentication section to getting-started.md or create dedicated auth.md

missing.description: Toggle Offline Mode command exists with setting but not documented
missing.suggestedDoc: Add Offline Mode section to advanced-features.md

missing.description: Commands for secure API key and MCP token storage exist but not documented
missing.suggestedDoc: Add Security section to settings.md or advanced-features.md covering: migrateSecureConfig, setApiKey, setMcpAuthToken

missing.description: 4 telemetry settings (endpoint, enabled, console, sampleRate) not documented
missing.suggestedDoc: Add Telemetry section to settings.md for users who want to configure OpenTelemetry tracing

recommendations.description: V2 Engine migration is complete. All docs referencing Guardian, guardian-lite, or plugin system need updating to reference packages/engine and signal scripts.
The new signal-based architecture (packages/engine/) is undocumented. Create overview showing signals → runtime → transports flow.
settings.md only covers ~15 of the 40+ available settings. Add sections for Engine, Auto Decision, MCP, Telemetry, and API settings.
The MCP server with 8 tools is a key feature for AI assistant integration. Create dedicated documentation explaining how to use MCP tools with Claude, Cursor, etc.
Sign in/out commands exist but users don't know how to authenticate. Add auth guide to getting-started.md.
Use 'Watch/Warn/Block' consistently instead of mixing with 'Watched/Warning/Protected'.
The CLI has 5 powerful commands via CLIEngineAdapter but minimal documentation. Create comprehensive guide.
FIXED 2025-12-17: README now says '50+ commands' (was '30 commands').
